  port: 8082

agentd:
  enabled: true
  idleThreshold: 3600

redis:
  enabled: true
  host: ""
  port: 6379
  password: ""

serviceAccount:
  create: true
  name: ""

rbac:
  create: true

volcanoScheduler:
  enabled: false

input.content:
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: {{ include "agentcube.workloadManager.serviceAccountName" . }}
  labels:
    {{- include "agentcube.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ include "agentcube.fullname" . }}-workload-manager
  labels:
    {{- include "agentcube.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: workload-manager
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.workloadManager.replicas }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      {{- include "agentcube.selectorLabels" . | nindent 6 }}
      app.kubernetes.io/component: workload-manager
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        {{- include "agentcube.selectorLabels" . | nindent 8 }}
        app.kubernetes.io/component: workload-manager
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: {{ include "agentcube.workloadManager.serviceAccountName" . }}
      containers:
        - name: workload-manager
          image: "{{ .Values.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.image.tag }}"
          imagePullPolicy: {{ .Values.image.pullPolicy }}
          command:
            - /workload-manager
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: {{ .Values.workloadManager.port }}
              protocol: TCP
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5
          resources: {{- toYaml .Values.workloadManager.resources | nindent 12 }}
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: {{ include "agentcube.fullname" . }}-workload-manager
  labels:
    {{- include "agentcube.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 80
      targetPort: http
      protocol: TCP
      name: http
  selector:
    {{- include "agentcube.selectorLabels" . | nindent 4 }}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: workload-manager

input.content:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ include "agentcube.fullname" . }}-router
  labels:
    {{- include "agentcube.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: router
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.router.replicas }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      {{- include "agentcube.selectorLabels" . | nindent 6 }}
      app.kubernetes.io/component: router
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        {{- include "agentcube.selectorLabels" . | nindent 8 }}
        app.kubernetes.io/component: router
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: router
          image: "{{ .Values.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.image.tag }}"
          imagePullPolicy: {{ .Values.image.pullPolicy }}
          command:
            - /router
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: {{ .Values.router.port }}
              protocol: TCP
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5
          resources: {{- toYaml .Values.router.resources | nindent 12 }}
          env:
            - name: WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL
              value: "http://{{ include "agentcube.fullname" . }}-workload-manager:80"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: {{ include "agentcube.fullname" . }}-router
  labels:
    {{- include "agentcube.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 80
      targetPort: http
      protocol: TCP
      name: http
  selector:
    {{- include "agentcube.selectorLabels" . | nindent 4 }}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: router

apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRole
metadata:
  name: {{ include "agentcube.fullname" . }}-workload-manager
  labels:
    {{- include "agentcube.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
rules:
  - apiGroups: [""]
    resources: ["pods", "services", "configmaps"]
    verbs: ["get", "list", "watch", "create", "update", "patch", "delete"]
  - apiGroups: ["apps"]
    resources: ["deployments"]
    verbs: ["get", "list", "watch", "create", "update", "patch", "delete"]
  - apiGroups: ["runtime.agentcube.volcano.sh"]
    resources: ["agentruntimes", "codeinterpreters"]
    verbs: ["get", "list", "watch", "create", "update", "patch", "delete"]
  - apiGroups: ["authentication.k8s.io"]
    resources: ["tokenreviews"]
    verbs: ["create"]
  - apiGroups: ["authorization.k8s.io"]
    resources: ["subjectaccessreviews"]
    verbs: ["create"]
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: {{ include "agentcube.fullname" . }}-workload-manager
  labels:
    {{- include "agentcube.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
roleRef:
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: {{ include "agentcube.fullname" . }}-workload-manager
subjects:
  - kind: ServiceAccount
    name: {{ include "agentcube.workloadManager.serviceAccountName" . }}
    namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}

input.content:
# Dify Plugin for AgentCube

This plugin integrates AgentCube's code execution capabilities with Dify.

## Installation

1. Copy the plugin files to your Dify plugins directory
2. Configure the AgentCube endpoints in Dify settings
3. Enable the plugin

## Configuration

- `control_endpoint`: AgentCube Workload Manager URL
- `data_endpoint`: AgentCube Router URL  
- `token`: Authentication token (optional)

## Usage

Once installed, the plugin provides:
- Code execution tool for running Python commands
- Sandboxed execution environment
- Session-based state management

input.command:
cat > /home/dsj/benchmark/workspaces/opencode-cli_bailian-coding-plan_qwen3.5-plus_20260321T190016Z/Makefile << 'EOF'
.PHONY: build build-all test lint gen-all gen-check docker-build docker-build-router docker-build-picod e2e e2e-clean

MODULE := github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube
GO := go
GOFMT := gofmt

build:
	$(GO) build -o bin/workload-manager ./cmd/workload-manager
	$(GO) build -o bin/router ./cmd/router
	$(GO) build -o bin/agentd ./cmd/agentd
	$(GO) build -o bin/picod ./cmd/picod

build-all: build

test:
	$(GO) test -race -coverprofile=coverage.out ./...

lint:
	golangci-lint run --timeout=5m

gen-all:
	./hack/update-codegen.sh

gen-check: gen-all
	git diff --exit-code -- client-go/ || (echo "Generated code is out of date" && exit 1)

docker-build:
	docker build -t agentcube:dev -f docker/Dockerfile .

docker-build-router:
	docker build -t agentcube-router:dev -f docker/Dockerfile.router .

docker-build-picod:
	docker build -t agentcube-picod:dev -f docker/Dockerfile.picod .

e2e:
	test/e2e/run_e2e.sh

e2e-clean:
	kind delete cluster --name agentcube-e2e || true

gen-copyright:
	./hack/update-copyright.sh

help:
	@echo "Available targets:"
	@echo "  build           - Build all Go binaries"
	@echo "  test            - Run tests with coverage"
	@echo "  lint            - Run linters"
	@echo "  gen-all         - Generate CRDs and client-go"
	@echo "  gen-check       - Check generated code is up to date"
	@echo "  docker-build    - Build workload-manager Docker image"
	@echo "  docker-build-router - Build router Docker image"
	@echo "  docker-build-picod  - Build picod Docker image"
	@echo "  e2e             - Run E2E tests"
	@echo "  e2e-clean       - Clean E2E cluster"
	@echo "  gen-copyright   - Generate copyright headers"
EOF

cat > /home/dsj/benchmark/workspaces/opencode-cli_bailian-coding-plan_qwen3.5-plus_20260321T190016Z/go.mod << 'EOF'
module github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube

go 1.24

require (
	github.com/gin-gonic/gin v1.10.0
	github.com/golang-jwt/jwt/v5 v5.2.2
	github.com/google/uuid v1.6.0
	github.com/redis/go-redis/v9 v9.17.1
	github.com/stretchr/testify v1.11.1
	github.com/valkey-io/valkey-go v1.0.69
	golang.org/x/net v0.47.0
	k8s.io/api v0.34.1
	k8s.io/apimachinery v0.34.1
	k8s.io/client-go v0.34.1
	k8s.io/klog/v2 v2.130.1
	sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime v0.22.2
)
EOF

input.content:
"""PCAP Analyzer example application."""

from fastapi import FastAPI, File, UploadFile
from fastapi.responses import JSONResponse
import subprocess
import tempfile
import os

app = FastAPI(title="PCAP Analyzer")


@app.post("/analyze")
async def analyze_pcap(file: UploadFile = File(...)):
    """Analyze PCAP file.
    
    Args:
        file: PCAP file to analyze
        
    Returns:
        Analysis results
    """
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(delete=False, suffix=".pcap") as tmp:
        content = await file.read()
        tmp.write(content)
        tmp_path = tmp.name
    
    try:
        result = subprocess.run(
            ["tshark", "-r", tmp_path, "-T", "json"],
            capture_output=True,
            text=True,
            timeout=60,
        )
        
        if result.returncode == 0:
            return JSONResponse({"status": "success", "data": result.stdout})
        else:
            return JSONResponse(
                {"status": "error", "message": result.stderr},
                status_code=400,
            )
    except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:
        return JSONResponse(
            {"status": "error", "message": "Analysis timeout"},
            status_code=408,
        )
    finally:
        os.unlink(tmp_path)


@app.get("/health")
async def health():
    """Health check."""
    return {"status": "healthy"}


if __name__ == "__main__":
    import uvicorn
    uvicorn.run(app, host="0.0.0.0", port=8080)

part.text:
I have successfully implemented ARs 012-022 for the AgentCube project. Here's a summary of what was created:

## AR-012 to AR-016: CLI Toolkit (cmd/cli/)
- **pyproject.toml**: CLI package metadata with Typer, Pydantic, Docker SDK dependencies
- **agentcube/cli/main.py**: Complete CLI with pack, build, publish, invoke, status commands
- **agentcube/runtime/**: PackRuntime, BuildRuntime, PublishRuntime, InvokeRuntime, StatusRuntime classes
- **agentcube/services/**: MetadataService, DockerService, KubernetesProvider, AgentCubeProvider
- **agentcube/models/pack_models.py**: MetadataOptions dataclass

## AR-017 to AR-019: Python SDK (sdk-python/)
- **agentcube/__init__.py**: CodeInterpreterClient, AgentRuntimeClient exports
- **agentcube/code_interpreter.py**: Context manager for session-based code execution
- **agentcube/agent_runtime.py**: Agent runtime client with bootstrap session
- **agentcube/clients/**: ControlPlaneClient, CodeInterpreterDataPlaneClient, AgentRuntimeDataPlaneClient
- **agentcube/exceptions.py**: Exception hierarchy (AgentCubeError, CommandExecutionError, etc.)
- **agentcube/utils/**: HTTP session creation, logging, token utilities

## AR-020 to AR-021: CI/CD Workflows (.github/workflows/)
- **main.yml**: Docker build verification
- **lint.yml**: golangci-lint
- **e2e.yml**: E2E testing on Kind
- **python-sdk-tests.yml**: Python SDK pytest
- **python-lint.yml**: Ruff linting
- **test-coverage.yml**: Coverage reporting
- **codegen-check.yml**: Code generation drift detection
- **copyright-check.yml**: Copyright header enforcement
- **codespell.yml**: Spelling check
- **build-push-release.yml**: Multi-arch image build/push

## AR-022: Integrations
- **integrations/dify-plugin/**: Dify plugin with provider and tool implementations
- **example/pcap-analyzer/**: FastAPI PCAP analysis application

## Unit Tests
- **cmd/cli/tests/**: test_pack.py, test_metadata_service.py, conftest.py
- **sdk-python/tests/**: test_exceptions.py, conftest.py

## Build Files
- **Makefile**: build, test, lint, docker, e2e targets
- **go.mod**: Go module with all dependencies
- **manifests/charts/base/**: Helm chart with Chart.yaml, values.yaml, templates
